title: Camo Creepers
description: Creepers that blend in more with the environment
body:
This mod adds a new creeper that changes color to blend in more with the environment, which means they try to blend in with the grass colors of biomes etc.

By default this mod swaps vanilla creeper spawns with the camo creepers this can be changed in the config.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
